criteria.name: thiserror_entry_point
criteria.description: Identifies thiserror's public API: #[derive(Error)] proc macro re-exported from main crate, with impl in thiserror-impl proc-macro crate.
criteria.groundTruth: thiserror re-exports #[derive(Error)] from thiserror-impl; the main crate lib.rs provides the Error trait auto-impl and From impls via generated code

criteria.name: defu_entry_point
criteria.description: Identifies defu's public API: defu(), defuFn(), defuArrayFn() exports from src/defu.ts using createDefu() factory.
criteria.groundTruth: defu exports defu (standard), defuFn (function merger), defuArrayFn (array-only function merger), all created via createDefu() factory pattern

criteria.name: itsdangerous_entry_point
criteria.description: Identifies itsdangerous's public API: Signer, TimestampSigner, Serializer classes as the primary interface.
criteria.groundTruth: itsdangerous exposes Signer (basic sign/unsign), TimestampSigner (with expiration), and Serializer (JSON/high-level serialization) as the public API surface

criteria.name: error_handling_patterns
criteria.description: Compares error handling: thiserror generates Error impls via derive, defu uses null/undefined skipping, itsdangerous raises BadSignature/BadTimeSignature/SignatureExpired exceptions.
criteria.groundTruth: thiserror: compile-time Error impl generation via derive macro. defu: silent skip of null/undefined values during merge. itsdangerous: runtime exception hierarchy (BadSignature, BadTimeSignature, SignatureExpired)

criteria.name: design_patterns
criteria.description: Identifies key design patterns: thiserror uses proc-macro derive + code generation, defu uses factory pattern (createDefu) with strategy (merger), itsdangerous uses template method (Signer base + TimestampSigner override).
criteria.groundTruth: thiserror: proc-macro derive pattern for code generation. defu: factory pattern (createDefu) with optional strategy (merger function). itsdangerous: template method pattern (TimestampSigner overrides sign/unsign from Signer base class)
